shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files | sed -n '1,120p' && rg -n \"supports|maxZoom|Zoom|isImage|render\\.slide|zoom\" packages src test tests 2>/dev/null | head -240"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' src/plugins/zoom/Zoom.tsx 2>/dev/null || true; sed -n '1,220p' src/plugins/zoom/ZoomWrapper.tsx; sed -n '1,140p' src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomImageRect.ts; sed -n '1,150p' src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomState.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' src/plugins/zoom/index.ts; sed -n '1,120p' src/plugins/zoom/props.ts; rg -n \"ZoomWrapper|useZoomImageRect|useZoomState|render.*slide|slide.type|isImageSlide\" src test/unit/plugins/Zoom.spec.ts"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"type Slide|interface Slide|Slide.*type|SlideVideo|SlideImage\" src/types.ts src | head -120; sed -n '1,120p' src/plugins/video/Video.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,55p' src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomState.ts; git diff -- src/plugins/zoom src/plugins/zoom/index.ts test/unit/plugins/Zoom.spec.ts"
/bin/bash -lc 'git status --short; git diff --check; npx eslint src/plugins/zoom test/unit/plugins/Zoom.spec.ts'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
